whatsNew: Added Recognition of Prior Learning controls inside Developer Mode.
RPL can be recorded by selecting complete assignments or individual KSBs.
Selecting an assignment automatically recognises every KSB mapped to it.
Selecting individual KSBs automatically completes an assignment when all of its mapped KSBs are covered.
RPL updates course progress, KSB completion, assignment badges, XP, rewards and the next recommended action.
Course assignments and the KSB matrix clearly label completion achieved through RPL.
RPL remains separate from submitted evidence, so it does not create false assignment PDFs or signatures.
All RPL selections can be changed, removed or cleared for each course.
